name: data-warehouse-analytics-funnel-analysis-engine
description: T177 FunnelAnalysisEngine — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Funnel steps ordered and tenant-scoped. conversionRate = converted/entered, bounded [0,1]. Emits FunnelAnalysisGenerated.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: ordered funnel steps, conversionRate = converted/entered bounded [0,1], tenant-scoped, FunnelAnalysisGenerated emission
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + funnel-analysis + conversion-rate + bounded-ratio + ordered-steps patterns for T177

Break T177 into: consume queue event → load funnel definition (ordered steps, tenant-scoped) → count users at each step → compute conversionRate = converted/entered → clamp to [0,1] → storeDocument(funnelAnalysis) → emit FunnelAnalysisGenerated

Generate funnel-analysis-engine.service.ts — queue consumer, loads funnel step definitions from DATABASE (tenant-scoped from ALS). Steps are ordered — sequential traversal only. conversionRate = converted / entered, result clamped to [0, 1] (Math.min(1, Math.max(0, rate))). Denominator guard: if entered===0 return conversionRate=0. DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE FunnelAnalysisGenerated.
Named check validation: funnel_steps_ordered, conversion_rate_formula, rate_bounded_0_to_1, denominator_zero_guard, tenant_scoped, funnel_analysis_generated_emitted
Score generated code 0-100 against T177 iron rules: ordered steps, correct conversionRate formula, [0,1] bound, zero-denominator guard, tenant isolation
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=ordered-steps+bounded-conversion-rate+zero-guard, rejected=unordered-steps OR unbounded-rate OR missing-zero-denominator-guard. curriculumTier=1.
